PF1EL.Help.ClassFeatures: Grant these items as children when this item's associated class reaches the listed level.
PF1EL.Help.SpellSupplements: Route these spells into a spellbook. Choose the destination and, optionally, gate each spell behind a class level or Hit Dice total.
PF1EL.Mode.Label: Destination
PF1EL.Gating.Label: Level gating
PF1EL.Warning.SpellOnly: Only spells can be added to Spell Supplements.
PF1EL.Warning.BadDrop: That item could not be resolved and was not added.
PF1EL.Warning.NoClassSpell: This item type can't be tied to a class, so Class Spellcasting is unavailable — spells will route to Spell-like Abilities.
